mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_alarm_history WHERE deleted = 0 AND occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_alarm_realtime WHERE deleted = 0 AND confirmed = 0 AND suppressed = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_alarm_realtime WHERE deleted = 0 AND suppressed = 1
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, occur_time, recover_time)) / 60.0, 0) FROM t_alarm_history WHERE deleted = 0 AND recover_time IS NOT NULL AND occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT COALESCE(sp.specialty_name, '未知') AS name, COUNT(1) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(1) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(1)) OVER(), 2) AS percentage FROM t_alarm_history h LEFT JOIN dim_specialty sp ON h.specialty_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE h.deleted = 0 AND h.occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY sp.specialty_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE h.alarm_level WHEN 1 THEN '一级' WHEN 2 THEN '二级' WHEN 3 THEN '智能预警' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(1) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(1) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(1)) OVER(), 2) AS percentage FROM t_alarm_history h WHERE h.deleted = 0 AND h.occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY h.alarm_level ORDER BY h.alarm_level

SELECT CASE h.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '预测预警' WHEN 2 THEN '故障预警' WHEN 3 THEN '阈值预警' WHEN 4 THEN '视频预警' WHEN 5 THEN '速率预警' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(1) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(1) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(1)) OVER(), 2) AS percentage FROM t_alarm_history h WHERE h.deleted = 0 AND h.occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY h.alarm_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT h.alarm_title AS alarmTitle, h.alarm_type AS alarmType, COALESCE(sp.specialty_name, '未知') AS specialtyName, COUNT(1) AS frequency, COALESCE(AVG(h.duration_seconds), 0) AS avgDurationSeconds FROM t_alarm_history h LEFT JOIN dim_specialty sp ON h.specialty_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE h.deleted = 0 AND h.occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY h.alarm_title, h.alarm_type, sp.specialty_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT h.alarm_title AS alarmTitle, h.alarm_type AS alarmType, COALESCE(sp.specialty_name, '未知') AS specialtyName, COUNT(1) AS frequency, COALESCE(SUM(h.duration_seconds), 0) AS totalDurationSeconds FROM t_alarm_history h LEFT JOIN dim_specialty sp ON h.specialty_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE h.deleted = 0 AND h.occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY h.alarm_title, h.alarm_type, sp.specialty_name ORDER BY totalDurationSeconds DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(occur_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_level = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS level1Count, SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_level = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS level2Count, SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_level = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS level3Count, COUNT(1) AS totalCount FROM t_alarm_history WHERE deleted = 0 AND occur_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(occur_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
